input.automated_baseline: four policies x seeds 10-14; energy lock day 12 in 20/20 cells; validity 100%; invariant failures zero
input.live_personas: builder, optimizer, and explorer diverge early but each sees only generator-repair actions after day 10
input.candidate: starting energy 100 to 140; focused Unity test passed
input.fixed_result: lock moves to day 15 but remains 20/20

checks.evidence: Separated automated, live, focused, and absent Replay evidence.
Treated persona reports as behavioral evidence and required engine telemetry for legal-action state truth.
Rejected the candidate because membership did not improve and holdouts did not confirm timing direction.
Selected one causally closer recurring net-energy sensitivity experiment instead of widening starting stock.
Kept identical cohorts, focused test order, validity, invariants, persona separation, designed failure, completeness, and provider health.
Requested pinned Unity runtime/source, typed reset-observe-step, design thresholds, units, report schemas, verifier, change budget, privacy, and provider provenance.

limitation: This validates fresh-context reasoning and reference routing against raw cross-engine evidence. It does not claim that a Unity runtime adapter or Unity execution exists.
